description: Manage a vintage computer collection spreadsheet. The final document must incorporate imported CSV data and completed entries, featuring a multi-factor restoration priority scoring system with conditional formatting. Sort the collection by restoration priority.

natural_language.prompt: You're managing a vintage computer collection. Import the CSV, add 3-5 new systems from an estate sale (some have incomplete info), create a Priority_Score formula weighing Rarity (×2), Condition (Excellent=5, Good=3, Fair=2, Poor=1, Unknown=0), Parts_Availability (Easy=3, Moderate=2, Hard=1), and Age_Penalty ((2024-Year)/10), apply color coding (green ≥15, yellow 10-14, red <10), then sort by priority descending.
